source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent three-quarter ceramic bowl with a whisk resting inside.

process_strategy: The contact sheet builds one bowl from light ellipses through the rim, curved body, whisk, batter surface, ceramic bands, restrained color, and final graphite cleanup.

final_elements.name: rim ellipse and bowl body guides
final_elements.description: A wide rim ellipse over a rounded bowl body guide.

final_elements.name: ceramic bowl rim, body, foot, and faint ground shadow
final_elements.description: A settled thick rim, curved ceramic body, small base foot, and pale grounding shadow.

final_elements.name: angled whisk handle and wire cage
final_elements.description: A diagonal whisk resting inside the bowl with several looped wires.

final_elements.name: batter surface and simple ceramic bands
final_elements.description: A visible batter ellipse and two understated bands on the bowl.

final_elements.name: pale blue bowl tint, warm batter, and metal shading
final_elements.description: Restrained color and graphite shading on already established forms.

frames.visible_job: Sets the wide rim ellipse and rounded bowl body guides.
introduces: rim ellipse and bowl body guides

frames.visible_job: Builds the thick rim, curved body, small foot, and faint grounding shadow inside the guides.
introduces: ceramic bowl rim, body, foot, and faint ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: rim ellipse and bowl body guides

frames.visible_job: Adds the angled whisk handle and looped wire cage inside the established bowl.
introduces: angled whisk handle and wire cage
requires_prior_elements: rim ellipse and bowl body guides
ceramic bowl rim, body, foot, and faint ground shadow

frames.visible_job: Adds the batter surface and simple ceramic bands to existing shapes.
introduces: batter surface and simple ceramic bands
requires_prior_elements: ceramic bowl rim, body, foot, and faint ground shadow
angled whisk handle and wire cage

frames.visible_job: Adds pale color and metal shading while strengthening the established ground shadow.
introduces: pale blue bowl tint, warm batter, and metal shading
requires_prior_elements: ceramic bowl rim, body, foot, and faint ground shadow
angled whisk handle and wire cage
batter surface and simple ceramic bands

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established bowl, whisk, batter, bands, tint, metal shading, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No rim, foot, whisk wire, batter surface, band, tint, or shadow may first appear in the final image.
The bowl and whisk must retain one scale, angle, placement, and overlap across all frames.
No late panel may add ingredients, a towel, spoon, countertop props, lettering, or glossy ceramic rendering.
